DET.headline: Jalen Duren scores 20 points and the Detroit Pistons beat the Charlotte Hornets 118-100
DET.description: — Jalen Duren had 20 points, Duncan Robinson scored 19 and the Detroit Pistons beat Charlotte 118-100 on Friday night, locking the Hornets into the play-in tournament.

DET.headline: NBA's most valuable players in 15 categories: Scoring, shooting, more
DET.description: From best fadeaway to the MVP, Dean Oliver uses ESPN Analytics' Net Points metric to wrap up the season by handing out awards.

DET.headline: NBA intel: What execs, coaches, scouts are watching this postseason
DET.description: Are the Lakers toast? Is the Spurs' 3-point prowess real? We canvass the league on six storylines that could define the postseason.

IND.headline: NBA offseason 2026: Draft, free agency, trade targets for every team
IND.description: Summer is here for 10 franchises that missed the postseason. What lies ahead for Milwaukee, Dallas and each eliminated team?

IND.headline: Detroit visits Indiana, seeks 60th victory of season
IND.description: Detroit Pistons (59-22, first in the Eastern Conference) vs. Indiana Pacers (19-62, 14th in the Eastern Conference)

IND.headline: Tyrese Maxey scores 32 and Sixers beat Pacers 105-94 to snap 3-game skid
IND.description: — Tyrese Maxey scored 32 points, Paul George had 21 and the Philadelphia 76ers beat the Indiana Pacers 105-94 on Friday night to snap a three-game skid.
